where-can-ai-be-used-2026.authorsShort: A. Cai, I. YeckehZaare, S. Sun, V. Charisi, X. Wang, et al.
where-can-ai-be-used-2026.summary: A current-facing paper that reflects the move toward understanding where AI can productively augment human work through a structured ontology of activities.

rmp-yolo-2025.authorsShort: J. Sun, J. Li, T. Liu, C. Yuan, S. Sun, et al.
rmp-yolo-2025.summary: Robust motion prediction for partially observable scenarios, reflecting the continued systems and autonomy thread in the research portfolio.

drivescenegen-2024.authorsShort: S. Sun, Z. Gu, T. Sun, J. Sun, C. Yuan, et al.
drivescenegen-2024.summary: A generative simulation paper that broadens the portfolio beyond planning into the creation of diverse and realistic scenarios for autonomy development.

fiss-plus-2023.authorsShort: S. Sun, J. Chen, J. Sun, C. Yuan, Y. Li, et al.
fiss-plus-2023.summary: A coarse-to-fine planning framework that reinforces the technical foundation of efficient real-time trajectory generation.

maxent-irl-frenet-2023.authorsShort: T. Zhang, S. Sun, J. Shi, S. Chen, M. H. Ang, et al.
maxent-irl-frenet-2023.summary: A planning-oriented study on learning reward functions that reflect human driving tendencies in multi-lane scenarios.

fiss-2022.authorsShort: S. Sun, Z. Liu, H. Yin, M. H. Ang
fiss-2022.summary: A core planning paper in the portfolio, showing the algorithmic groundwork behind later systems and simulation work.

autonomous-research-platform-cleaning-20.authorsShort: S. Sun, T. Zhang, Z. Xiang, Y. Han, D. Li, et al.
autonomous-research-platform-cleaning-20.summary: A systems paper focused on an autonomous cleaning platform deployed across varied real-world environments.
